visual_features.color_appearance: bright red (vase), clear (bottles), yellowish (oil), light purple (oil), white (reeds, caps)
visual_features.presentation: lifestyle shot on a wooden table with a blurred indoor background
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: IRIS Home Fragrances branding visible on all items. One oil bottle is labeled 'Apple Cinnamon Oil', the other 'Lavender Reed Diffuser Oil'. Extra reeds are included.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a reed diffuser set on a polished wooden surface. The central item is a glossy, bright red, flattened, teardrop-shaped ceramic vase with several white diffuser reeds fanning out from its top. To the left and right of the vase are clear glass bottles with white caps, containing yellowish and light purple liquids respectively, both labeled "IRIS Home Fragrances" with a butterfly logo. Several additional white reeds are laid horizontally in front of the main diffuser, against a blurred indoor background featuring a green potted plant and a wooden headboard or wall panel.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A red IRIS reed diffuser vase with white reeds, flanked by two bottles of scented oil (Apple Cinnamon, Lavender), on a wooden table.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Label features 'Blue Oud' and 'ROSEMOORE' text, with a blue abstract floral pattern.

media_assets.visual_description: A clear glass cylindrical bottle containing a light yellow liquid is centered against a plain white background. The bottle features a shiny silver-colored cap and a white label with a blue abstract floral pattern. The label prominently displays 'Blue Oud' in black text, with 'ROSEMOORE' in a smaller black box below it.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A clear glass bottle of Rosemoore Blue Oud fragrance oil with a silver cap and a white label with blue floral design.

The carrying case is elongated with a rounded top, features a black zipper and strap, and has a red tag with 'MILTON THERMOSTEEL' branding.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Milton and Thermosteel branding visible on flask and case.
